module.name: StaticContentSample
module.param: This dashboard provides visibility into sessions that are above the defined threshold for acceptable session load times. Session load time is defined as the length of time it takes from when the user clicks on a virtual desktop to when that session is in an 'Active' state (meaning the user is presented with a usable desktop). Sessions whose load times are below the threshold are flagged as Poor. This report provides a count of sessions over time for the selected time range, a breakdown of those sessions by user, IP, and client type, as well as the average load time across the deployment. Adjust the time range for this report by changing the timerange picker. Filter this view by entering values in the fields below and pressing Enter.

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_sessions_sourcetype` SessionState=Active Active $user$ | `session_desktop_lookup` | search $vm_name$ $CatalogName$ $HostingServerName$ | `client_name` | `get_times` | `poor_loadtime` | stats last(SessionState) as SessionState last(dur) as duration last(load_time) as load_time last(session_load) as session_load last(BrokeringTime) as BrokeringTime last(CatalogName) as CatalogName last(ClientAddress) as ClientAddress last(HostingServerName) as HostingServerName last(DeviceId) as DeviceId last(client_dvc_type) as client_dvc_type last(HardwareId) as HardwareId last(ClientName) as ClientName last(UserSID) as UserSID last(ClientVersion) as ClientVersion last(AgentVersion) as AgentVersion last(IPAddress) as IPAddress last(Protocol) as Protocol last(DesktopSID) as DesktopSID by user vm_name StartTime ControllerDNSName _time | dedup vm_name StartTime

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | dedup StartTime vm_name user |search session_load=Poor | stats count | eval range="session"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search session_load=Poor | stats dc(user) as users | eval range="user"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search session_load=Poor | stats dc(vm_name) as vms | eval range="session"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search session_load=Poor | stats max(load_time) as load_time | eval load_time = round( load_time,2) | eval range="time"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | dedup StartTime vm_name user | search session_load=Poor |stats max(load_time) as "Load Time" by user | head 10 | sort - "Load Time"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_sessions_sourcetype` $user$ | `session_desktop_lookup` | `client_name` | `get_times` | stats last(SessionState) as SessionState last(dur) as duration last(BrokeringTime) as BrokeringTime last(CatalogName) as CatalogName last(ClientAddress) as ClientAddress last(HostingServerName) as HostingServerName last(DeviceId) as DeviceId last(client_dvc_type) as client_dvc_type last(HardwareId) as HardwareId last(ClientName) as ClientName last(UserSID) as UserSID last(ClientVersion) as ClientVersion last(AgentVersion) as AgentVersion last(IPAddress) as IPAddress last(Protocol) as Protocol last(DesktopSID) as DesktopSID by vm_name SessionStateChangeTime

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | dedup StartTime vm_name user | search session_load=Poor |stats max(load_time) as "Load Time" by ClientAddress | head 10 | sort - "Load Time"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_sessions_sourcetype` $ClientAddress$ | `session_desktop_lookup` | `client_name` | `get_times` | stats last(SessionState) as SessionState last(dur) as duration last(BrokeringTime) as BrokeringTime last(CatalogName) as CatalogName last(ClientAddress) as ClientAddress last(HostingServerName) as HostingServerName last(DeviceId) as DeviceId last(client_dvc_type) as client_dvc_type last(HardwareId) as HardwareId last(ClientName) as ClientName last(UserSID) as UserSID last(ClientVersion) as ClientVersion last(AgentVersion) as AgentVersion last(IPAddress) as IPAddress last(Protocol) as Protocol last(DesktopSID) as DesktopSID by vm_name SessionStateChangeTime

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | dedup StartTime vm_name user | search session_load=Poor |stats max(load_time) as "Load Time" by vm_name | head 10 | sort - "Load Time"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_sessions_sourcetype` | `session_desktop_lookup` | search $vm_name$ | `client_name` | `get_times` | stats last(SessionState) as SessionState last(dur) as duration last(BrokeringTime) as BrokeringTime last(CatalogName) as CatalogName last(ClientAddress) as ClientAddress last(HostingServerName) as HostingServerName last(DeviceId) as DeviceId last(client_dvc_type) as client_dvc_type last(HardwareId) as HardwareId last(ClientName) as ClientName last(UserSID) as UserSID last(ClientVersion) as ClientVersion last(AgentVersion) as AgentVersion last(IPAddress) as IPAddress last(Protocol) as Protocol last(DesktopSID) as DesktopSID by vm_name SessionStateChangeTime

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | dedup StartTime vm_name user | search session_load=Poor |stats max(load_time) as "Load Time" by ControllerDNSName | sort - "Load Time"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_sessions_sourcetype` | `session_desktop_lookup` | search $ControllerDNSName$ | `client_name` | `get_times` | | stats last(SessionState) as SessionState last(dur) as duration last(BrokeringTime) as BrokeringTime last(CatalogName) as CatalogName last(ClientAddress) as ClientAddress last(HostingServerName) as HostingServerName last(DeviceId) as DeviceId last(client_dvc_type) as client_dvc_type last(HardwareId) as HardwareId last(ClientName) as ClientName last(UserSID) as UserSID last(ClientVersion) as ClientVersion last(AgentVersion) as AgentVersion last(IPAddress) as IPAddress last(Protocol) as Protocol last(DesktopSID) as DesktopSID by vm_name SessionStateChangeTime

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | dedup StartTime vm_name user| search session_load=Poor | stats max(load_time) as "Load Time" by client_dvc_type | sort - "Load Time"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_sessions_sourcetype` | `session_desktop_lookup` | `client_name` | search $client_dvc_type$ | `get_times` | stats last(SessionState) as SessionState last(dur) as duration last(BrokeringTime) as BrokeringTime last(CatalogName) as CatalogName last(ClientAddress) as ClientAddress last(HostingServerName) as HostingServerName last(DeviceId) as DeviceId last(client_dvc_type) as client_dvc_type last(HardwareId) as HardwareId last(ClientName) as ClientName last(UserSID) as UserSID last(ClientVersion) as ClientVersion last(AgentVersion) as AgentVersion last(IPAddress) as IPAddress last(Protocol) as Protocol last(DesktopSID) as DesktopSID by vm_name SessionStateChangeTime

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | dedup StartTime vm_name user| search session_load=Poor | stats max(load_time) as "Load Time" by ClientVersion | sort - "Load Time"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_sessions_sourcetype` $ClientVersion$ | `session_desktop_lookup` | `client_name` | `get_times` | stats last(SessionState) as SessionState last(dur) as duration last(BrokeringTime) as BrokeringTime last(CatalogName) as CatalogName last(ClientAddress) as ClientAddress last(HostingServerName) as HostingServerName last(DeviceId) as DeviceId last(client_dvc_type) as client_dvc_type last(HardwareId) as HardwareId last(ClientName) as ClientName last(UserSID) as UserSID last(ClientVersion) as ClientVersion last(AgentVersion) as AgentVersion last(IPAddress) as IPAddress last(Protocol) as Protocol last(DesktopSID) as DesktopSID by vm_name SessionStateChangeTime
